about.title: About Wholesalify
about.description: Wholesalify is a modern B2B wholesale ordering platform designed for wholesalers, distributors, and trade companies.
about.mission: Our mission is to simplify wholesale operations by providing an all-in-one platform for managing orders, inventory, and purchasing.
about.vision: We envision a world where every wholesale business, regardless of size, can operate efficiently with modern technology.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Desc: We collect information you provide directly, including name, email, and business information when you sign up for early access or contact us.
privacy.section2Desc: We use the information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and send you updates about Wholesalify.
privacy.section3Desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.
privacy.section4Desc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Desc: By accessing or using Wholesalify, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.section2Desc: Wholesalify provides a B2B wholesale ordering platform. You agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.
terms.section3Desc: All content and materials available on Wholesalify are the property of Wholesalify or its licensors.
terms.section4Desc: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us.
